MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-564267, CGC-18-564265 WITH CASE CGC-18-564264
Off Calendar Sep-07-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearancy by any party or counsel.

PLAINTIFFS GARY ROSANCRANS, JOYCE ROSANCRANS, DENNIS OBER, DEBRA OBER, AND ANNA GILBERT'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE RELATED ACTIONS PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL OF CASE(S) CGC-18-564267, CGC-18-564265 WITH CASE CGC-18-564264.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: The motion to consolidate actions is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Cases CGC-18-564267, CGC-18-564265 and CGC-18-564264 are consolidated for all purposes. CGC-18-564264 is designated the lead case and all future filings shall be made under that case number. Order signed. (see order for full details)
